prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为633→624→803→1006→689名，整体呈波动上升后回落态势；2024年因扩招及专业结构调整位次后移至1006名，2025年大幅回升至 689名，显示该校在物理类考生中吸引力有所恢复；本省物理类计划2021年31人、2022年30人、2023年30人、2024年29人、2025年15人（大幅缩减），2026年（§ 7）计划17人，较2025年扩招约13.3%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在第17–19名（2026年第17名），属于全国 顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风及校园安全事件，但整体关注度有限；抖音热度排名第44（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等；历史投 档异常记录中未出现人大物理类断档信号；拥有9个A+学科（法学、应用经济学、理论经济学、社会学、统计学、工商管理、新闻传播学、中国语言文学、马克 思主义理论），A-及以上共15个学科，人文社科实力全国顶尖；物理类招生专业涵盖计算机、统计学、数学、人工智能等理工交叉方向，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热；法学、金融/财经/经济呈分化观望；本省物理类考生2021年205,920→2025年320,192→2026年347,000人，近年持续 增长，竞争加剧；省控线2025年本科批405分，较2024年422分下降，卷面难度可能有所变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升趋势、2026年计划扩招约13.3%及物理类考生 增长约8.4%，扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅前移（位次数字减小）；预测最低位次约724名，区间641–807名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 633→624→803→1006→689, showing an overall trend of fluctuating upward then declining; in 2024, due to expansion and major restructuring, the ranking moved back to 1006, but in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 689, indicating a recovery in attractiveness among Physics Category candidates; provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 31 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 15 in 2025 (sharply reduced), with a 2026 plan of 17 (an increase of about 13.3% over 2025), easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable at 17th–19th in recent years (17th in 2026), placing it among the top universities nationwide; in 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety incidents, but overall attention is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with moderate short video platform exposure; historical admission anomaly records show no signs of a gap in Renmin University's Physics Category admissions; it has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Applied Economics, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Statistics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory), and a total of 15 disciplines rated A- or above, with humanities and social sciences strength at the national top; Physics Category enrollment majors include Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence, and other interdisciplinary directions in science and engineering, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain consistently popular; Law, Finance/Economics/Economy show divergence and wait-and-see attitudes; the number of provincial Physics Category candidates grew from 205,920 in 2021 to 320,192 in 2025 and 347,000 in 2026, with continuous increase and intensified competition; the provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, possibly indicating changes in exam difficulty.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in 2025 rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 13.3%, and the Physics Category candidate growth of about 8.4%, the expansion rate slightly exceeds the candidate growth rate, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (smaller ranking number) compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 724, with a range of 641–807.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 128→105→111→112→138, showing an initial rise followed by a decline; from 2021 to 2024, it stabilized in the 105–128 range, then shifted to 138 in 2025, with a recent decline of about 26 places; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 36 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 46 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 49, an increase of about 6.5% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main List has been stable at 17th–19th in recent years (17th in 2026), placing it among the top universities nationwide; in 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to teacher ethics incidents (aftermath of the 2024 sexual harassment case) and campus safety, which may somewhat suppress application intentions; its Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively popular), with moderate exposure on short video platforms; there are no signs of a cutoff drop for Renmin University's History Category in historical application anomalies; it has 9 A+ disciplines (Law, Applied Economics, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Statistics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory), and a total of 15 disciplines rated A- or above, making it a national leader in humanities and social sciences, highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Finance/Economics/Economy show divergent wait-and-see attitudes, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; the number of History Category candidates in the province was 165,702 in 2021 → 142,547 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026, with a significant increase of about 31.2% in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 446 points, up from 438 points in 2024, raising the competition threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the declining trend in rankings in 2025, a slight enrollment expansion of about 6.5% in 2026, and a significant increase of about 31.2% in History Category candidates, the growth in candidates far exceeds the expansion rate, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to continue to decline (ranking number increases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 153, with a range of 103–203.
